_comment: claude-code-router config. Copy to ~/.claude-code-router/config.json and replace ${LITELLM_API_KEY} with your real proxy key (from the LiteLLM proxy / hermes-llm-infra .env). Then launch Claude Code on YOUR models with: ccr code . — no Anthropic billing. Vision (screenshots) must route to gemini (R1 is text-only).
